validation_rows.requirement: P2_BUILD_LOCK must validate before P3 source spec is actionable
every registered source item has identity, kind, role, and origin metadata
accepted source snapshot manifests use the existing schema fields and are immutable and hash-bound
review-required and rejected source items cannot become downstream semantic authority
downstream handoff uses dependency_manifest schema fields and references only eligible items or explicit blockers through artifact hashes
candidate scope stays inside P3-SPEC-SOURCE and does not create locks or implementation code

minimum_test_obligations: fixture with one text PRD freezes and creates source_snapshot_manifest
external link without local snapshot routes to review_required
image source is frozen but semantic adoption is blocked until extraction evidence exists
secret-bearing input is excluded or redacted through separate derivative artifact
conflicting authority roles produce a human review blocker
downstream handoff rejects mutable or rejected sources
